metadata.key_format: (fixture, claim_id, term, reference_form) tuple; decoupled from finding_id hash format for forward-compat with Phase 9 dedup key normalization

categories.description: Intro via N重量份(至M重量份)的X, N莫耳的X, N wt%的X — numeric composition prefix that _INTRO_PATTERN does not recognize
Intro via 至少N個X, 兩X, N個X — quantifier construction not in _INTRO_MULTI_QUANTIFIERS

Intro via inline 一X where the 一 is preceded by a content verb, conjunction, or other context that the current _INTRO_PATTERN left-anchor rejects. Fix shape is left-anchor denylist conversion (reject only preceding 該/所述/前述/其中一), NOT a verb allowlist. Generalizes V一X, 為一X, 輸出一X, 依據一X及一Y, etc.
Intro via X的Y or 形成於X的Y where Y is new and has no 一 prefix; HIGH RISK family because bare-noun intros are surface-form-identical to undefined references
Intro via 定義為X, 稱為X, 記為X, 表示為X — definitional verb prefix not recognized by _INTRO_PATTERN
Walker captures trailing character (particle/verb) into the parenthesized numeral group, e.g., 第一銜接部銜接(222) instead of 第一銜接部(222)
Walker parses 一個 as quantifier + noun start and eats the first character of a compound noun, e.g., 一個人化特徵 parsed as 一個 + 人化特徵 instead of 一 + 個人化特徵
Walker regex noun class fails on a non-CJK char after ordinal and truncates capture to bare 第一/第二

Walker extends capture past a legitimate noun boundary into a fresh N+V clause, e.g., 所述聚苯醚|成分包括 captured as 聚苯醚成分 when the correct boundary falls between 聚苯醚 and 成分 (成分包括 is a fresh N+V predicate). Fix shape is right-boundary lookahead for content-verb followers (包括/包含/是/為/用以/配置以/能夠).
Real drafting error in the source patent — walker is correctly flagging. MUST preserve (protect: true). The round-5 該使用者介面 canonical example lives here.
Term is cleanly introduced in a parent claim but the ancestor-chain walker fails to reach it (cross-category method→system, multi-parent BFS gap, etc.). Phase 9 territory.
全世界/地域-class idiomatic disjunction captures. Deferred to Phase 9 per CLAUDE.md known limitations.
Cannot be categorized from the excerpt alone. Requires reading the full claim text to disambiguate. Schema v2 pass eliminated all v1 ambig entries; category preserved for future fixture additions.

metadata.notes: The source check emits a single aggregate CheckItem per document (set of unique flagged terms). Per-finding records in this snapshot are produced by an audit-only re-walk that replicates the check's internal loop (imports _INTRO_PATTERN from the source module; uses a capturing variant of _REF_PATTERN so reference_form can be exposed). Each fixture record includes a canonical_unique_terms array and a cross_check_ok boolean asserting that the set of unique terms in the audit findings equals the canonical CheckItem.details term set. Finding IDs use claim_{id}_{sha256(term)[:8]}_{within_claim_idx} to remain stable across reruns. | Schema v2 (2026-04-10): ambig resolution pass — all 13 v1 ambig entries recategorized by reading full claim text. Category miss_intro.mid_sentence_verb_object renamed to miss_intro.inline_one_prefix (fix-agnostic name; the corpus pattern is any 一X appearing inline, and the fix shape is a left-anchor denylist conversion rather than a verb-allowlist extension). New category walker_bug.noun_boundary_overgreedy added for 108P001015 c4 聚苯醚成分 (walker extends past a legitimate noun boundary into the fresh N+V clause 成分包括). protect:true count 5 → 8 (+3: 110P000868 c1/c3/c5 電子裝置 — drafter conflated 電子裝置 with 行動裝置; claim never introduces 電子裝置 despite the symbol table listing 800:電子裝置). Proposed walker_bug.conjunction_split_intro category was rejected and collapsed into miss_intro.inline_one_prefix after recognizing the 4 第二方向 findings are the same left-anchor rejection as 為一容置杯體 and 輸出一解鎖指令; one generalized fix covers all sites.
